step.name: verify-eligibility
step.action: Confirm <5 pilots delivered for this offering. If 5 reached, transition new customers to standard.
step.decision-gate: If pilot count ≥ 5, STOP — move to standard price.

step.name: compute-pilot-price
step.action: Set pilot price ≥ cost basis; typically 50-70% of standard.

step.name: capture-consent
step.action: Get written case-study consent (logo + metrics + captured_at) before pilot starts.

step.name: write-transition-clause
step.action: Document post-pilot standard rate + trigger (renewal / continuation past 14d).

step.name: deliver-within-timebox
step.action: Deliver in ≤14 days. Mid-pilot checkpoint at day 7.
